scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/wrst && tsc -p packages/cli && tsc -p example
scripts.build:apple-watch: xcodebuild -project packages/apple-watch/AppleWatch.xcodeproj -scheme 'AppleWatch Watch App' -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=watchOS Simulator' build
scripts.build-release:apple-watch: xcodebuild -project packages/apple-watch/AppleWatch.xcodeproj -scheme 'AppleWatch Watch App' -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=watchOS Simulator' build
